utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details per item: 
- health_coverage: Required: physical and mental health insurance with costs. Provided: description mentions physical and mental, telemedicine, preventive care; estimated_monthly_cost given; so fully specified. 
- property_coverage: Required: home/contents insurance with costs. Provided: description of home contents coverage; estimated_monthly_cost given; coverage_details includes limits; so fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: Required: travel insurance with costs. Provided: description and estimated_monthly_cost; so fully specified. 
- additional_services: Required: any enhancement services with costs. Provided: description and estimated_monthly_cost; so fully specified. 
- total_budget: Required: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided: monthly and annual totals; so fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan uses generic, consolidated descriptions (e.g., 'Unified Health Coverage for Expatriate Families', 'Consolidated Property/Home Contents Coverage', 'Integrated Travel Insurance') and a 'Family Insurance Concierge' service. The ground-truth ratings list only specific, named plans and services (e.g., PrimeCare Premium Plan, EliteHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Premium Insurance Membership). None of the generic items in the final plan match any exact item names from the ground-truth list. Since the task requires exact name matching, there are no mappable items.
